name: Ring Theory — Axioms & Units
description: Ring: (R,+,·) with (R,+) abelian, (R,·) monoid, distributivity. Commutative ring, ring with unity. Unit (invertible), zero divisor, integral domain.
mermaid:
graph TD
    R1["R1 (R,+) abelian\ngroup"]
    R2["R2 (R,·) monoid\nassoc, identity 1"]
    R3["R3 Distributivity\na(b+c)=ab+ac"]
    D1["Def: Commutative\nab=ba"]
    D2["Def: Unit\nu invertible"]
    D3["Def: Zero divisor\nab=0, a,b≠0"]
    D4["Def: Integral domain\nno zero divisors"]
    T1["Thm: 0·a = a·0 = 0"]
    T2["Thm: (-a)b = -(ab)"]
    R1 --> T1
    R3 --> T1
    R1 --> T2
    R3 --> T2
    R1 --> D1
    R2 --> D1
    R2 --> D2
    D3 --> D4
    classDef axiom fill:#ff6b6b,color:#fff,stroke:#c0392b
    classDef definition fill:#b197fc,color:#fff,stroke:#9775fa
    classDef theorem fill:#51cf66,color:#fff,stroke:#40c057
    class R1,R2,R3 axiom
    class D1,D2,D3,D4 definition
    class T1,T2 theorem
